summary: Coverage review found material gaps against Phase 11 ACs. One critical mismatch was fixed inline (reject-without-reason now asserts disabled submit), but mutation-header assertions and several AC-specific checks are still incomplete across flows.

issues.description: Mutation paths (submit/signoff) do not assert Idempotency-Key UUID format or If-Match presence where ETag is known, violating Phase 11 invariant #3.
issues.fix: Capture submit/signoff requests with waitForRequest and assert headers with UUID regex (Idempotency-Key) and If-Match on known-ETag mutations.

issues.description: Flow covers scheduler behavior but does not assert mutation request headers (Idempotency-Key/If-Match) for submit/signoff/publish scheduling operations.
issues.fix: Instrument each mutating UI/API action with request capture and header assertions, including schedule publish confirmation.

issues.description: Governance chain assertion verifies event types/order but misses causation/correlation-chain validation required by Task 11.2 AC; timeline test also omits timestamp/browser-TZ assertion.
issues.fix: Assert causation_id/correlation linkage across the returned chain and validate rendered timeline timestamps in pt-BR/local timezone.

issues.description: Task 11.6 ACs are only partially covered: scenario uses reviewer as second actor (not explicit second author-role user) and does not validate UI toast path for 423 lock via keyboard-triggered edit action.
issues.fix: Seed/use a second author-role actor for lock UX checks and add a UI-triggered locked-edit attempt that asserts toast/error rendering.

issues.description: Submit/signoff assertions focus on status/code and governance events, but do not enforce Idempotency-Key UUID assertion on captured outgoing mutation requests.
issues.fix: Capture outgoing submit/signoff requests and assert Idempotency-Key format consistently with UUID regex helper.
